room.name: a detention cell in the Ministry of Love.
room.description: A small detention cell in the Ministry of Love. A few other miserable looking detainees are sitting along side you on a narrow bench. Everyone looks starved and gaunt. Some have clearly been savagely beaten. There are no windows in the room and only one solid iron door, firmly locked. A telescreen watches silently. You wait nervously for whatever is to come next.
